<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; use ProxyManager\Proxy\ProxyInterface; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Stub; /** * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> * * @final * * @internal since Symfony 7.3 */ class ProxyManagerCaster { public static function castProxy(ProxyInterface $c, array $a, Stub $stub, bool $isNested): array { if ($parent = get_parent_class($c)) { $stub->class .= ' - '.$parent; } $stub->class .= '@proxy'; return $a; } }
